name: Italian Sausage Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Italian sausage into 2-inch lengths.
2. Brown the sausage off in olive oil until it is mostly cooked, then remove from the pan and set aside.
3. In the same pan, add flour to the remaining oil and make a roux over medium heat.
4. Add onions, celery, and bell pepper; stir and cook until tender or translucent.
5. Gradually add water, stirring until smooth.
6. Stir in wine (adjust amount as desired), parsley, garlic, Lea & Perrins, dried mint, and tomato sauce.
7. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil and season with salt to taste.
9. Return the sausage pieces to the pan and bring back to a boil.
10. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 3 to 4 hours until flavors are well developed.
11. Serve over spaghetti, topped with cheese.
